stories.title: Rory McIlroy Wins 2026 Masters — Back-to-Back, Joins Tiger in History Books

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
BACK-TO-BACK. Rory McIlroy wins the 2026 Masters.

12-under. One shot over Scheffler. Nearly blew a 6-shot 36-hole lead — then won anyway.

First to defend the green jacket since Tiger Woods (2001-02). Six majors. Two green jackets.

#GolfFanrecap #TheMasters

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Nicklaus. Faldo. Tiger. Rory.

Only four players in history have won back-to-back Masters. McIlroy joins the list.

He bogied 18 to finish. Still won by one. That's just who he is now.

#GolfFanrecap #RoryMcIlroy

article.headline: Rory McIlroy Joins Tiger Woods in History: Back-to-Back Masters Champion

image_concepts.label: Image 1A
text_overlay: BACK-TO-BACK MASTERS / MCILROY 2025-2026" in Bebas Neue gold

stories.title: Fitzpatrick Stuns Scheffler in Playoff to Win RBC Heritage — Second Win in Three Starts

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Matt Fitzpatrick: 2 wins and a runner-up in 2026. Biggest run of his career.

This week he beat World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler in a playoff — 4-iron, 204 yards, 13 feet.

Then he drained the birdie putt. World No. 3. #GolfFanrecap #RBCHeritage

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Scottie Scheffler erased a 3-shot deficit in the final 4 holes at Harbour Town — and still lost.

Matt Fitzpatrick was just better when it counted. Playoff. First sudden-death hole. Done.

The hottest player in golf not named Rory. #GolfFanrecap

article.headline: Fitzpatrick Beats Scheffler in Playoff to Win RBC Heritage: Two Wins in Three Starts

image_concepts.label: Image 2A
text_overlay: PLAYOFF WIN / SCHEFFLER BEATEN / WORLD No. 3" in Bebas Neue gold

stories.title: Rahm Dominates LIV Golf Mexico City — 6-Shot Win, Spanish Podium Sweep

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Jon Rahm. 7-under 64. Bogey-free. 6-shot win.

Spanish podium sweep at LIV Golf Mexico City. Rahm / Puig / Ballester.

Legion XIII wins the team title for the THIRD consecutive year. Rahm owns LIV in 2026.

#GolfFanrecap #LIVGolf

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Jon Rahm's 2026 season through LIV Mexico City:
— 2 individual wins
— Legion XIII team: 3 straight team titles (2024, 2025, 2026)

Spain's Rahm, Puig, and Ballester swept the entire podium this week.

Rahm is on a different level. #GolfFanrecap #LIVGolf

article.headline: Rahm Demolishes LIV Golf Mexico City Field: Spanish Podium, Legion XIII Three-Peat

image_concepts.label: Image 3A
text_overlay: RAHM DOMINATES / 6-SHOT WIN / LIV MEXICO CITY" in Bebas Neue red/gold

stories.title: Zurich Classic Starts Thursday — Griffin/Novak Defend, Lowry/Koepka Headline

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Zurich Classic starts TOMORROW at TPC Louisiana.

Defending: Ben Griffin + Andrew Novak (trying to become the first team EVER to go back-to-back)

Hot team: Matt Fitzpatrick + Alex Fitzpatrick (Matt: 2 wins in 3 starts)

$9.5M on the line. #GolfFanrecap #ZurichClassic

article.headline: Zurich Classic 2026 Preview: Griffin and Novak Chase History, Fitzpatrick Brothers Arrive in Hot Form

image_concepts.label: Image 4A
text_overlay: ZURICH CLASSIC 2026 / THURSDAY APRIL 23 / TEAM GOLF IS BACK" in Bebas Neue

stories.title: Chevron Championship Begins Thursday — LPGA's First Major, Korda Favored

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Chevron Championship starts TOMORROW in Houston — the LPGA's first major of 2026.

$8 million purse. 48 of the top 50 in the world. Nelly Korda the 5-to-1 favorite.

Women's major season officially begins. #GolfFanrecap #ChevronChampionship

article.headline: Chevron Championship 2026 Preview: Korda Favored as Women's Major Season Begins in Houston
